General.Name: Redsun Properties Group Ltd
General.Description: Redsun Properties Group Limited, an investment holding company, operates in the property development and commercial real estate business primarily in the People's Republic of China. It operates through Property Development and Management Services; Commercial Property Investment and Operations; and Hotel Operations segments. The company develops, operates, and manages commercial, residential, and other properties. It also leases properties; and operates hotels, as well as provides business information consulting services. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Nanjing, the People's Republic of China. Redsun Properties Group Limited operates as a subsidiary of Hong Yang Group Company Limited.
General.Address: 26th Floor, Hong Yang Building, Nanjing, China, 210000
